channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Optimum
item.description: High-performance client fork. Compile-time patches, no Harmony. Same gameplay, faster frames

item.title: Vanilla Fantasy Overhaul - Lore Mobs
item.description: A remodling of the Lore Mobs to make them fantastical. Not Finished.

item.title: Currency Exchange
item.description: A light-weight currency exchange addon for the Coinage Mod

item.title: Underwater Horrors
item.description: Adds nightmare sea monsters to Vintage Story (Sea Serpents, Kraken)

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Greatly increases the threat the elements pose, blizzards, hurricanes, monsoons. Get ready!

item.title: Food Preferences
item.description: Adds a preference for foods that is personalized per world and per player

item.title: Alternative armor designs
item.description: With this mod, you can make use of all vanilla armor designs for each respective armor pieces.

item.title: Unique Weapons
item.description: Adds mostly Dark and Darker themed weapons to vintage story with custom models and textures

item.title: Tillerworks
item.description: Drivable tractors and towable farming trailers with installable engines, wheels, and homemade fuel.

item.title: Greenscreen
item.description: Adds two backdrop blocks, made to help with thumbnail creation.

item.title: Better Honey in Meals
item.description: Makes honey give the same amount of satiety in a meal as most fruits, but not as much as breadfruit.

item.title: Use Beeswax instead of Fat
item.description: I couldn't find the motivation for animal husbandry, but I do have many many bees.

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: ReelMower
item.description: Push reel mower. Cut grass, Multiplayer in testing

item.title: VintageReborn Server Tweak
item.description: VSReborn use only

item.title: pony races
item.description: imagine still larping a dead childrens cartoon in current year

item.title: Free The Horse
item.description: Big buff medieval semi-truck spawning wild in your area.

item.title: Electrical Progressive: Basics
item.description: Basic electrical devices

item.title: Wildcraft x Expanded Foods Compatability
item.description: A work-in-progress mod that aims to act as a bridge between Wildcraft: F&N + Expanded Foods

item.title: Mad Crow Glider
item.description: A Gliders made to have the appearence of a Tobias's Mad Crow wings and Color Variants for Gliders

item.title: Rustwall
item.description: Overhaul mod intended for use in multiplayer servers.

item.title: wildherbfix
item.description: server side tweak

item.title: WOO Presents: Fantasy Crops
item.description: Fantasy Crops catered to play on the Whispers of Oldwood, available for all.

item.title: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack
item.description: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack（复古物语模组汉化包）

item.title: Pepper's Clutter and Decor
item.description: A clutter mod adding decorations and plushies! Blocks like string lights, wallpapers, and more!

item.title: Portcullis, Drawbridges and stuff
item.description: Adds Portcullis, Drawbridges, Brazier and a working lever to add some RP to your builds.

item.title: Advanced Chat
item.description: A fully customizable, movable, resizable chat overlay for Vintage Story. Take control of your chat w

item.title: Laboror's Multi-Tools - Expanded Metals Compatibility
item.description: Adds metal variants to Laboror's Tools.

item.title: Thunderlord re-animated
item.description: 100% Certified Fresh Thunderlord walk animation

item.title: Infinite Jump
item.description: This mod lets you jump like Kirby in Super Smash Bros, but Infinitely! It is a cheat mod.
